title: Circa 1923 Chevrolet Wooden-Bodied Funeral Coach
description: An early Chevrolet funeral coach with an elaborate hand-carved wooden body, heart-and-wing motif and formal dark-green finish.

title: Circa 1923 Chevrolet Funeral Coach — Interior
description: The richly carved wooden interior of an early Chevrolet funeral coach, complete with curved roof ribs and an ornate period display.

title: 1926 Chevrolet Roadster
description: A 1926 Chevrolet Roadster presented with open touring bodywork, black fenders and a simple upright grille characteristic of early motoring.

title: 1936 Cadillac V-16 Coupe — Front View
description: A pale green Cadillac V-16 Coupe with sweeping fenders, a tall formal grille and dual driving lamps; the museum placard identifies its V-16 power.

title: 1936 Cadillac V-16 Coupe — Rear View
description: The rear three-quarter view highlights the Cadillac’s formal coupe roofline, integrated luggage rack, flowing fenders and elegant cream finish.

title: 1936 Oldsmobile Convertible Coupe
description: A black 1936 Oldsmobile Convertible Coupe with a tan soft top, streamlined grille, wide whitewall tires and period auxiliary lamps.

title: 1950 Chevrolet Sedan Delivery “JAWZ”
description: A customized black 1950 Chevrolet Sedan Delivery known as “JAWZ,” presented with its hood raised and detailed display board.

title: 1955 Chevrolet Bel Air Nomad
description: A red-and-white 1955 Chevrolet Bel Air Nomad, Chevrolet’s stylish two-door sport wagon, shown with its signature chrome trim and wraparound glass.

title: 1955 Chevrolet Bel Air Nomad — Front View
description: A head-on look at the 1955 Bel Air Nomad, framed by its egg-crate grille, hood ornament and vivid red-and-white finish.
alt: 1955 Chevrolet Bel Air Nomad — Front View

title: 1955 Chevrolet Service Truck — Front View
description: The service truck’s front view highlights its Task Force-era Chevrolet grille, rounded fenders and bright Drink Coke livery.

title: 1955 Chevrolet Service Truck — Three-Quarter View
description: A custom-bodied 1955 Chevrolet service truck dressed in period Coca-Cola and Budweiser graphics, recalling mid-century beverage delivery fleets.

title: 1956 Mercury Montclair
description: A coral-and-white 1956 Mercury Montclair with dramatic hooded headlights, a bright waterfall grille and richly detailed mid-century chrome.

title: 1957 Chevrolet Cameo Carrier — Front View
description: The front view of a turquoise 1957 Chevrolet Cameo Carrier, pairing Task Force truck styling with upscale two-tone trim and wide whitewall tires.

title: 1957 Chevrolet Cameo Carrier — Rear View
description: A turquoise-and-cream 1957 Chevrolet Cameo Carrier displaying its car-inspired bedsides, hidden-spare rear bumper and oak-lined cargo bed.

title: 1958 Pontiac Star Chief
description: A coral-and-cream 1958 Pontiac Star Chief featuring ornate chrome, broad whitewall tires and the model’s distinctive late-1950s styling.

title: 1959 Chevrolet Impala Sport Coupe — Front View
description: A front view of the turquoise 1959 Impala, featuring its wide chrome grille, quad headlamps and unmistakable jet-age detailing.
alt: 1959 Chevrolet Impala Sport Coupe — Front View

title: 1959 Chevrolet Impala Sport Coupe — Rear View
description: A turquoise 1959 Chevrolet Impala Sport Coupe showcasing its dramatic batwing rear fins, cat-eye taillights and sweeping chrome trim.
alt: 1959 Chevrolet Impala Sport Coupe — Rear View

title: 1964 Chevrolet Chevelle
description: A white 1964 Chevrolet Chevelle with a red interior, upgraded 454-cubic-inch V8, four-speed manual transmission and redline tires.

title: 1965 Chevrolet Chevelle Z16
description: A rare Crocus Yellow 1965 Chevrolet Chevelle Z16 with a black roof and Chevrolet’s 396-cubic-inch, 375-horsepower V8.

title: 1976 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am
description: A red 1976 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am dominated by its iconic hood bird, split grille and muscular second-generation profile.

title: 1979 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am
description: A black 1979 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am with quad rectangular headlamps, a shaker hood and a silver hood-bird graphic.

title: Classic Corvette Collection at Muscle Car City
description: A wide view of the museum floor featuring rows of classic Chevrolet Corvettes and other American performance cars.
alt: Classic Corvette Collection at Muscle Car City

title: 2014–2019 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (C7) — Front View
description: A Torch Red seventh-generation Chevrolet Corvette Stingray, defined by its sharp lighting, sculpted hood and low, purposeful stance.

title: 2014–2019 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (C7) — Side View
description: A three-quarter side view of the Torch Red C7 Stingray, highlighting its sweeping roofline, side vents and polished five-spoke wheels.

title: 2014–2019 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray (C7) — Rear View
description: The C7 Corvette’s rear view showcases its angular taillamps, quad center exhaust and sculpted fastback proportions.

title: Boss Hoss 502 V8 Motorcycle — Side View
description: A full side view of the Boss Hoss 502, exposing the enormous V8 engine, polished hardware and stretched cruiser proportions.
alt: Boss Hoss 502 V8 Motorcycle — Side View

title: Boss Hoss 502 V8 Motorcycle — Rear View
description: A Boss Hoss motorcycle powered by a massive 502-cubic-inch V8, combining cruiser styling with unmistakable hot-rod engineering.
alt: Boss Hoss 502 V8 Motorcycle — Rear View

title: Supercharged Chevrolet Dragster — Full View
description: The dragster’s full profile reveals its needle-like nose, exposed front wheels, long chassis and rear-mounted supercharged V8.

title: Supercharged Chevrolet Dragster — Rear View
description: A long-wheelbase dragster viewed from the rear, exposing its supercharged Chevrolet V8, massive slicks and towering aerodynamic wing.

title: Supercharged Chevrolet Dragster — Engine Detail
description: A close view of the dragster’s supercharged Chevrolet V8, polished headers and dense collection of period racing decals.

title: Custom Dodge Viper V10 Engine Bay
description: A meticulously detailed custom engine compartment built around a Dodge Viper V10, highlighted by orange intake components and polished induction hardware.
alt: Custom Dodge Viper V10 Engine Bay

title: Miss Budweiser U-1 Unlimited Hydroplane
description: The Miss Budweiser U-1 racing hydroplane, displayed in its vivid red-and-white Budweiser livery alongside its transport trailer.

title: Vintage Polly Gas Pump
description: A restored green-and-black Polly Gas pump topped by the brand’s distinctive parrot globe, recalling the golden age of roadside service stations.

title: Vintage Mobilgas Pump
description: A restored red-and-white Mobilgas pump crowned by the flying red Pegasus globe.

title: Vintage American Gas Visible Pump
description: A tall visible-cylinder American Gas pump with a glass fuel chamber and illuminated red crown.

title: Vintage Super Shell Gas Pump
description: A restored yellow-and-white Super Shell pump topped by a luminous scallop-shell globe.
